Off Calendar Feb-06-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, Not reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Yasin Salma appears with counsel Francisco G. Torres; Respondent, Ian A. MacDonald appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Appellant's counsel examines Ian A. MacDonald.
Appellant's counsel examines his client Mr. Salma.
